description.tr: Reference experience on the UK→Turkey corridor with tracking, storage and customs advisory.
description.en: Reference experience on the UK→Turkey corridor with tracking, storage and customs advisory.

keyword.tr: vision uk turkey corridor, digital tracking
keyword.en: vision uk turkey corridor, digital tracking

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

We aim for end-to-end visibility: customer notifications, proactive ops updates and tight field feedback loops.
